info.title: PayZu Pix API
info.description:
REST API for Pix operations on the PayZu platform, deposits, withdrawals, internal transfers, infractions, reports, and callback inspection. All amounts are in BRL (reais) unless explicitly noted. Authentication uses a Bearer token issued during onboarding.

## SDKs oficiais

- Node.js: `npm install payzu-pix`
- Python: `pip install payzu-pix`
- Go: `go get github.com/PayZuPlus/payzu-sdks/go`
- PHP: `composer require payzu/pix`

Repo: https://github.com/PayZuPlus/payzu-sdks

tags.name: Withdrawals
tags.description: Send money via Pix (cash out) and DICT key/QR-code consultation

tags.name: Internal Transfer
tags.description: Transfer funds between PayZu accounts (free, instant)

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account profile, balance, and auto-withdraw configuration

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Transaction history, reports, bank statements, and pending deposits

tags.name: Infractions
tags.description: Manage Pix infractions (disputes, fraud reports) and submit defenses

post.description: Create a new Pix **deposit** (charge). Returns QR Code and transaction details.

generatedName.description: Payer full name. Letters and spaces only.

generatedDocument.description: Payer CPF (11 digits) or CNPJ (14 digits), no punctuation.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until the QR Code expires. Default: 600.

virtualAccount.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) para correlacionar lojas, filiais, marketplaces. Volta no callback.

400.description: Bad Request, payload or query string failed validation

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

401.description: Unauthorized, missing or invalid Bearer token, or token lacks the required permission for this endpoint

get.description: Get the latest status and details for a Pix **deposit (charge)**. Provide **one** of `id`, `clientReference`, or `endToEndId`. Use apenas um destes parâmetros: id, clientReference, endToEndId. Combinar mais de um retorna erro.

parameters.name: clientReference
parameters.description: External reference provided when creating the charge.

parameters.name: virtualAccount
parameters.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) usada na criação. Aceito como chave de busca alternativa.

400.description: Bad Request, payload or query string failed validation

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

401.description: Unauthorized, missing or invalid Bearer token, or token lacks the required permission for this endpoint

get.description: Query the DICT (Diretório de Identificadores de Contas Transacionais) to retrieve information about a Pix key before sending a payment. Returns the key owner's details and associated financial institution.

parameters.name: pixKey
parameters.description: The Pix key to lookup (CPF, CNPJ, email, phone, or EVP).

message.example: The provided Pix key has an invalid format.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

404.description: Pix key not found in DICT

message.example: The specified Pix key was not found in DICT.

post.description: Decode and extract information from a Pix QR Code (EMV format) before making a payment. Returns the parsed data including receiver details, amount (if present), and other QR Code metadata. No momento a PayZu só suporta QR Code dinâmico. QR estático ainda não é processado.

emv.description: The EMV payload string from the Pix QR Code.

message.example: The provided EMV payload is invalid or malformed.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

get.description: Retorna o comprovante da transação como JSON com o campo `base64` (PDF codificado). Decodifique pra exibir ou salvar como `.pdf`.

400.description: Bad Request, payload or query string failed validation

401.description: Unauthorized, missing or invalid Bearer token, or token lacks the required permission for this endpoint

post.description: Send a Pix **cash out** to the specified Pix key.

virtualAccount.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) para correlacionar lojas, filiais, marketplaces. Volta no callback.

400.description: Bad Request, payload or query string failed validation

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

401.description: Unauthorized, missing or invalid Bearer token, or token lacks the required permission for this endpoint

get.description: Retorna o status e os detalhes atuais de um saque. Informe pelo menos um destes parâmetros: `id`, `clientReference` ou `endToEndId`. Se informar mais de um, todos são aplicados como filtro (AND), o que pode não retornar registro caso não apontem para a mesma transação.

parameters.name: clientReference
parameters.description: External reference provided when creating the withdrawal.

parameters.name: virtualAccount
parameters.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) usada na criação. Aceito como chave de busca alternativa.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

post.description: Cash out using a **Pix QR Code** (static/dynamic). If `amount` is not provided, the QR Code's embedded value will be used. No momento a PayZu só suporta QR Code dinâmico. QR estático ainda não é processado.

amount.description: Amount in BRL. Optional - if not provided, uses the QR Code's embedded value.

virtualAccount.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) para correlacionar lojas, filiais, marketplaces. Volta no callback.

400.description: Invalid QR Code or missing amount for static QR Code without value

message.example: Amount is required for QR Codes without embedded value.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

post.description: Send funds to another PayZu account using its 6-digit accountNumber. Settles instantly within PayZu.

payerAccountNumber.description: Payer account number (6 digits). Must match the authenticated user's accountNumber.

virtualAccount.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) para correlacionar lojas, filiais, marketplaces. Volta no callback.

get.description: Retorna os dados de uma transferência interna. Informe pelo menos um destes parâmetros: `id` ou `clientReference` (também aceita `virtualAccount`). Se informar mais de um, todos são aplicados como filtro (AND).

parameters.name: virtualAccount
parameters.description: Subconta virtual (até 50 caracteres) usada na criação. Aceito como chave de busca alternativa.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

get.description: Retrieve a single transaction with its callback log and linked infractions.

Infraction.description: Histórico completo de infrações desta transação.

CallbackLog.description: Webhook delivery attempts for this transaction (most recent first)

status.description: HTTP status code returned by the receiver

post.description: Queue an asynchronous job that generates a CSV report of transactions for the given period and filters.

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

get.description: List report jobs created by the authenticated user.
Retorna o status e os metadados de um job de relatório específico pelo `id`.

post.description: Returns a short-lived signed URL to download the CSV file.

url.description: Short-lived signed URL to download the CSV (5 min validity)

value.message: Report file expired and is no longer available

post.description: Resend callbacks in bulk for transactions matching the given filters.

createdAtFrom.description: Period start (REQUIRED). Cannot be more than 30 days in the past.

createdAtTo.description: Period end (REQUIRED). Period span cannot exceed 7 days.

transactionEndToEndIds.description: Restrict to specific Pix end-to-end IDs

by_period.summary: Resend everything paid in the last day

filtered.summary: Only completed deposits in a 7-day window

value.message: Limite de reenvios atingido. Tente novamente em 1 minuto.

404.description: Transaction not found or has no callbackUrl configured

value.message: Limite de reenvios atingido. Tente novamente em 1 minuto.

post.description: Resend the callback of a single transaction.

get.description: Render the Pix QR Code of a deposit as a binary PNG image

400.description: Transaction is not a DEPOSIT or has no QR code

value.message: querystring/dateFrom Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

status.description: PENDING, COMPLETED, CANCELED, WAITING_FOR_REFUND, REFUNDED, EXPIRED, ERROR

payerAccountNumber.description: Payer's PayZu account number (6 digits). Present only on internal-transfer transactions.

receiverAccountNumber.description: Receiver's PayZu account number (6 digits). Present only on internal-transfer transactions.

refundEndToEndId.description: End-to-end ID of the refund transaction

refundStatus.description: Status of the refund (PENDING, COMPLETED, CANCELED, WAITING_FOR_REFUND, REFUNDED, EXPIRED, ERROR)

refundedAt.description: Date and time when the refund was processed

Transaction.description: Unified transaction representation used by all endpoints.

PixKeyInfo.description: Information about a Pix key from DICT lookup.

pixKey.description: The Pix key that was looked up.

document.description: CPF or CNPJ of the owner (partially masked for privacy).

name.description: Name of the Pix key owner.

accountType.description: Type of account (CACC = Current Account, TRAN = Transactional Account, SVGS = Savings).

institutionIspb.description: ISPB code of the financial institution.

institutionCode.description: COMPE code of the financial institution.

QRCodeReadResponse.description: Decoded information from a Pix QR Code.

document.description: CPF or CNPJ of the receiver.

amount.description: Amount to be paid (may differ from originalAmount for dynamic QR Codes).

originalAmount.description: Original amount embedded in the QR Code.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until QR Code expires (0 for static QR Codes).

createdAt.description: Creation date of the QR Code (for dynamic QR Codes).

url.description: URL assinada para download (expira em 9 minutos). Presente apenas ao buscar a defesa individual; ausente na listagem.
Webhook URL that received the callback

createdAt.description: Date and time when the callback log was created

hasNextPage.description: Indicates if there is a next page

expiresAt.description: When the file expires from storage (typically 7 days after creation)
